title: Docker MCP Server for Claude
detailMarkdown:
# Docker MCP Server for Claude
Manage Docker containers, images, and services directly through Claude with comprehensive Docker API integration
**Category:** mcp
**Author:** JSONbored
**Download trust:** first-party
**Tags:** `docker` `containers` `devops` `orchestration` `deployment`

## Install
```bash
claude mcp add docker -- npx -y @docker/mcp-server && claude mcp list
```

## Config
```json
{
  "docker": {
    "env": {
      "DOCKER_HOST": "${DOCKER_HOST:-unix:///var/run/docker.sock}",
      "DOCKER_API_VERSION": "${DOCKER_API_VERSION:-1.43}"
    },
    "args": [
      "-y",
      "@docker/mcp-server"
    ],
    "command": "npx"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp add docker -- npx -y @docker/mcp-server && claude mcp list

- https://heyclau.de/mcp/docker-mcp-server
